description_long: This is a metallic ceiling-mounted electric fan with five wide, slightly curved blades radiating from a central hub. The blades are evenly spaced and have a smooth, brushed metal finish, giving the fan a modern industrial appearance. The central housing is dome-shaped, with a subtle gold accent ring near the base, and is connected to a short, cylindrical downrod that attaches to a rounded ceiling mount. There is no visible blade guard, leaving the blades exposed for maximum airflow. The fan lacks any visible control panel or switches on its body, suggesting remote or wall-based operation. The overall design is streamlined and functional, suitable for large indoor spaces such as garages, workshops, or commercial environments.
description: A metallic ceiling fan with five wide, exposed blades and a dome-shaped central hub, featuring a gold accent ring and a modern industrial look.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the fan from a slightly angled perspective, highlighting the gold accent ring and the even spacing of the five blades.
description_view_1: View 1 presents a similar angle to view 0, but with a slight rotation, offering a clear look at the smooth, metallic finish of the blades.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the fan from another rotated angle, emphasizing the symmetry of the blades and the central dome housing.
description_view_3: View 3 provides a final rotated view, maintaining visibility of the gold accent and the exposed blade design.
attribute_blade_guard_design: There is no blade guard; the blades are fully exposed, emphasizing an open-frame design with no mesh or grille.
